title: Kamal Haasan Promises Industrial Growth in Karur Rally
summary: Kamal Haasan addresses a public rally promising industrial growth in Karur, particularly focusing on the textile and home furnishing exports sector.

title: DMK Door-to-Door Campaign in Karur Town
summary: DMK candidate conducts intensive door-to-door campaign in Karur town today, meeting weavers and textile workers.

title: AIADMK Promises Better Drinking Water in Thanthoni
summary: AIADMK nominee promises improved drinking water supply infrastructure in Thanthoni area of Karur.

title: TVK Distributes Booth Slips Across Rural Karur
summary: TVK workers distribute booth slips across rural Karur villages today as part of grassroots voter mobilization.

title: BJP Highlights Textile Industry Development
summary: BJP candidate highlights textile industry development plans for Karur district under central government schemes.

title: Flying Squads Seize Cash Near Kulithalai
summary: Flying squads seize unaccounted cash during vehicle checks near Kulithalai under model code enforcement.

title: DMK Vows Support for Handloom Weavers
summary: DMK candidate vows better support for handloom weavers in Karur, including procurement guarantees and welfare schemes.

title: NTK Voter Awareness in Aravakurichi Villages
summary: NTK activists organise voter awareness camps in Aravakurichi villages to ensure full participation on polling day.

title: Karur Collector Reviews Election Preparedness
summary: Karur Collector reviews election preparedness at the district control room today with senior officials and observers.

title: SVEEP Street Plays at Karur Bus Stand
summary: SVEEP teams conduct street plays on voting rights at the Karur bus stand area to reach commuters.

title: Paramilitary Deployed in Sensitive Polling Booths
summary: Paramilitary forces deployed in sensitive polling booths across Karur for safe and fair polling on April 23.

title: Observer Inspects EVM Storage Centre
summary: Election observer inspects the EVM storage centre in Karur to verify security and randomization protocols.

title: Vijay Interacts with Karur Youth
summary: TVK star campaigner Vijay interacts with youth in Karur town, promising startup support and skill centres.

title: Home Voting Facility for Elderly Voters
summary: Home voting facility has been arranged for elderly and differently-abled voters in Karur constituency.

title: Congress Focuses on K.Paramathi Irrigation
summary: Congress alliance candidate focuses on farmers' irrigation needs in K.Paramathi constituency.

title: DMK Pledges Skill Development Centres
summary: DMK candidate pledges skill development centres for youth across Karur district.

title: BJP Visits Small-Scale Textile Units
summary: BJP candidate visits small-scale textile industries in Karur to discuss MSME schemes.

title: Flying Squads Intensify Highway Checks
summary: Flying squads intensify checking on highways entering Karur to curb illegal cash and goods movement.

title: DMK Vows Improved Cauvery Delta Irrigation
summary: DMK candidate vows improved irrigation for Cauvery delta farmers in Karur.

title: SVEEP Volunteers Educate First-Time Voters
summary: SVEEP volunteers educate first-time voters in Karur colleges ahead of polling day.

title: MCC Violation Notice to Campaign Team
summary: An MCC violation notice has been issued to a campaign team in Karur after a flagged complaint.

title: EVM Commissioning Underway in Karur Constituencies
summary: Election officials in Karur have begun the commissioning of EVMs and VVPATs in the presence of candidate agents and observers ahead of the polling day.

title: DMK Intensifies Final-Phase Outreach in Karur
summary: DMK candidates and alliance workers have intensified door-to-door outreach across Karur, focusing on welfare scheme beneficiaries and first-time voters.

title: SVEEP Street Plays Boost Voter Awareness in Karur
summary: SVEEP teams in Karur performed street plays at bus stands and markets to encourage 100% voter turnout on April 23.

title: Flying Squads Intensify Vehicle Checks in Karur
summary: Flying squads in Karur have intensified vehicle checks at major entry points and highway intersections to curb illegal cash movement.

title: Karur Reports Smooth Progress on Postal Ballot Distribution
summary: District election officials confirmed that postal ballot distribution to service voters and senior citizens in Karur is progressing as per schedule.

title: AIADMK Holds Booth-Level Worker Meetings in Karur
summary: AIADMK held booth-level worker meetings across Karur to finalize polling-day strategy and voter mobilization plans.

title: Karur Colleges Host Voter Pledge Programs
summary: Colleges across Karur hosted voter pledge programs for first-time voters, accompanied by mock EVM demonstrations.

title: Karur Static Surveillance Teams Report Daily to Observers
summary: Static surveillance teams in Karur are reporting daily to election observers on cash, liquor, and freebie movement.

title: Strong Rooms Sealed in Karur After Final Randomization
summary: EVM strong rooms across Karur have been sealed under multi-tier security following the final randomization of polling personnel.

title: BJP Highlights Central Schemes During Karur Roadshow
summary: BJP candidates conducted a roadshow in Karur highlighting central government welfare schemes and infrastructure investments.

title: Booth Slip Distribution Crosses Halfway Mark in Karur
summary: Door-to-door booth slip distribution in Karur has crossed the halfway mark, with BLOs targeting full coverage by April 18.

title: MCC Violation Notices Issued in Karur Constituencies
summary: Several model code of conduct violation notices have been issued in Karur constituencies for unauthorised hoardings and campaign material.

title: Karur Collector Reviews Polling Station Readiness
summary: The District Collector held a review meeting with returning officers in Karur to assess polling station readiness, water supply, and accessibility ramps.

title: TVK Cadre Steps Up Door-to-Door Drive in Karur
summary: TVK cadre led by local coordinators stepped up the door-to-door campaign across Karur, distributing pamphlets and party manifestos.

title: Karur Administration Installs Awareness Hoardings
summary: The Karur district administration has installed voter awareness hoardings at major junctions, urging citizens to exercise their franchise.

title: Karur Police Beef Up Security at Sensitive Booths
summary: Karur district police have beefed up security at sensitive booths with paramilitary deployment and additional patrol vehicles.

title: Mock Polls Demonstrated to Candidates in Karur
summary: Mock polls were demonstrated to candidate representatives in Karur as part of EVM transparency measures before the April 23 election.

title: Congress Workers Hold Street-Corner Meetings in Karur
summary: Congress alliance workers held street-corner meetings in Karur to highlight the alliance's promises on education and healthcare.

title: Voter Helpline Sees Spike in Calls from Karur
summary: The state voter helpline has seen a spike in calls from Karur, mostly enquiring about polling station details and voter slip status.

title: Liquor Seizure Reported During Karur Checks
summary: A significant liquor seizure was reported during routine election-related checks in Karur, and the contraband has been impounded.

title: Karur Voter List Final Verification Concluded
summary: Booth-level officers in Karur have concluded the final voter list verification, ensuring electoral roll accuracy ahead of polling.

title: NTK Organises Cycle Rally Across Karur Towns
summary: Naam Tamilar Katchi organised a cycle rally across Karur towns to highlight environmental and identity-based issues ahead of polling.

title: Karur Differently-Abled Voters Get Dedicated Assistance
summary: Differently-abled voters in Karur are receiving dedicated transport and assistance arrangements from the district election office.

title: Income Tax Teams Conduct Discreet Surveys in Karur
summary: Income Tax teams have been conducting discreet surveys in Karur to track unaccounted financial flows linked to the election period.

title: Sector Officers Deployed Across Karur Polling Zones
summary: Sector officers have been deployed across Karur polling zones to monitor turnout, address grievances, and report issues in real time.

title: Star Campaigners Schedule Final Rallies in Karur
summary: Major political parties have scheduled final-phase rallies of star campaigners in Karur as the silent period nears.

title: Social Media Influencers Promote Turnout in Karur
summary: Local social media influencers in Karur are running short-form video campaigns urging youth to vote on April 23.

title: Karur Cybercrime Cell Monitors Election Misinformation
summary: The Karur cybercrime cell is actively monitoring social media platforms for election-related misinformation and hate speech.

title: Karur Election Control Room Operates Round the Clock
summary: The election control room in Karur is functioning round the clock to handle voter complaints, MCC violations, and logistical queries.

title: Women Self-Help Groups Address Karur Candidates
summary: Women self-help group federations in Karur addressed candidates seeking concrete commitments on livelihood and credit access.

title: Karur Senior Citizens Avail Home Voting Facility
summary: Senior citizens above 85 in Karur are availing the home voting facility, with polling teams visiting registered residences.

title: Bank Cash Movement Tracked in Karur
summary: Bank cash movement above the threshold in Karur is being tracked and verified by election expenditure observers.

summary: Election officials in Karur have begun the commissioning of EVMs and VVPATs in the presence of candidate agents and observers ahead of the polling day.
